title: Set up Plausible analytics domain
notes: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN env var on production. Create the domain in Plausible dashboard first.

title: Create /solutions overview page
notes: Overview page linking to chatbot, lms-builder, and automation with a side-by-side comparison table.

title: Configure HubSpot CRM token
notes: Create a Private App in HubSpot, set HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN env var, test /api/integrations/hubspot POST.

title: Send first newsletter broadcast
notes: Wait until 50 subscribers. Subject: 'What we have been building at HostingOcean Solutions'. Resend or Nodemailer.

title: Set up Google Analytics 4 property
notes: GA4 property created. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID env var on production server.

title: Write blog post: LMS vs Moodle comparison
notes: Published as b14 in blog.json. Target keyword: 'Moodle vs custom LMS'.

title: Add Testimonials page to footer
notes: Added /testimonials link to companyLinks in Footer.tsx.

title: Test mobile layout on solutions pages
notes: Check all three solutions pages at 375px. Verify tier cards stack correctly on mobile.
